initiative.name: OpenIncident v0.2 - Incident Lifecycle & Bidirectional Slack
initiative.description: Complete the incident lifecycle with full bidirectional Slack integration: users can acknowledge/resolve incidents from Slack buttons, create incidents via /incident slash command, Slack messages sync to the incident timeline, and incidents can be created from the web UI. Builds on v0.1 foundation where status workflow, timeline, and one-way Slack posting are already implemented.
success_criteria: User clicks Acknowledge/Resolve buttons in Slack → incident status updates in DB and UI
User runs /incident new in Slack → incident created with Slack channel
Messages in incident Slack channel → appear as timeline entries in web UI
User clicks 'Declare incident' in web UI → modal creates incident with Slack channel
Resolved incidents → Slack channel archived after configurable delay
All bidirectional sync works via Socket Mode (no public URL required)
